info.title: SOL ⇄ DCC Bridge API
info.description:
REST API for the SOL-Gateway-DCC cross-chain bridge. Provides deposit/redeem instruction generation, transfer tracking, fee estimation, health monitoring, and admin operations.

**Security Note:** This API never holds funds. All instructions are generated for client-side signing.

### Rate Limits
- **Global:** 100 requests / 15 minutes per IP
- **Deposit/Redeem:** 10 requests / minute per IP
- Internal (localhost/Docker) requests bypass rate limiting.

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Protected admin dashboard endpoints (requires API key)

tags.name: CR Stable
tags.description: CR Stable stablecoin minting and info (backed 1:1 by USDC/USDT)

tags.name: Decentral USD
tags.description: DUSD stablecoin — deposit USDC/USDT to mint DUSD 1:1, redeem to unlock collateral

post.description: Creates a Solana transaction instruction for depositing native SOL into the bridge vault. The instruction must be signed client-side by the sender wallet.

get.description: Returns the current deposit limits, daily volume, and bridge operational status. Reads on-chain BridgeConfig account.

post.description: Creates a Solana transaction instruction for depositing an SPL token (e.g., USDC, USDT) into the bridge vault. The instruction must be signed client-side.
Creates a DCC burn instruction. The user signs this on the DCC side to burn wSOL.DCC, which triggers validators to unlock SOL on Solana.

get.description: Returns the current redeem limits, bridge pause state, and estimated unlock time.

post.description: Registers a new cross-chain transfer from the frontend. Records the transfer and returns a tracking ID.
Internal endpoint used by validators to mark a transfer as completed. Broadcasts an SSE update to connected clients.

get.description: Returns detailed status for a specific transfer. Checks local DB, then DCC bridge-core on-chain, then ZK verifier.

get.summary: Get transfer history for an address
get.description: Returns paginated transfer history for a specific wallet address (Solana or DCC).

Server-Sent Events stream for real-time transfer status updates. The client connects and receives push updates as the transfer progresses through its lifecycle. A keepalive ping is sent every 30 seconds.

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Each event is a JSON payload with `transferId`, `status`, and additional transfer fields.

get.description: Returns the complete fee schedule for all bridge paths (committee fast-path and ZK proof path) in both directions.
Calculates a fee quote for a specific amount and direction. Automatically selects the committee or ZK path based on the amount threshold (100 SOL).
Performs real-time connectivity checks against both Solana and DCC chains, verifies contract deployment, and returns validator/bridge status. Returns 503 if any chain is unreachable.

503.description: Bridge degraded — one or more chains unreachable

get.description: Returns on-chain bridge statistics including total minted/burned, vault balance, wSOL supply, collateralization ratio, and active validator count.
Returns a comprehensive overview for bridge operators including transfer stats, recent transfers, bridge state, and system metrics.
Returns recent transfers with optional status filtering. Limited to 200 results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of transfers to return (max 200)

patch.description: Allows operators to manually update a transfer's status for intervention scenarios. Broadcasts an SSE update to connected clients.

get.description: Returns aggregated transfer statistics for the admin dashboard.

post.description:
Creates a deposit instruction for minting CR Stable (CRS) tokens. Accepts USDC or USDT as the source token — SOL must be swapped to USDC/USDT client-side (via Jupiter) before calling this endpoint.

Returns PDA addresses and fee breakdown for client-side transaction construction.

get.description: Returns CR Stable token metadata, backing mechanism details, current reserve status, and fee schedule.

post.description: Creates a deposit instruction for minting Decentral USD (DUSD) tokens. Accepts USDC or USDT as the source token (1:1 backing). Returns PDA addresses and fee breakdown for client-side transaction construction.
Burns DUSD tokens and unlocks the underlying USDC or USDT collateral on Solana. Returns fee breakdown and output details.

get.description: Returns DUSD token metadata, backing mechanism details, current reserve status, and fee schedule.

AdminApiKey.name: X-Admin-Key
AdminApiKey.description: Admin API key. Can also be passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

recipientDcc.description: DCC wallet address to receive wSOL.DCC

maxDailyVolume.description: Maximum daily bridge volume in SOL

splMint.description: SPL token mint address (e.g., USDC mint)

instruction.description: Serialized Solana instruction for SPL token deposit

solRecipient.description: Solana wallet address to receive unlocked SOL

instruction.description: DCC burn instruction for client-side signing

amount.description: Amount in smallest units (lamports or DCC units)

splMint.description: SPL mint address (for SPL token transfers)

TransferStatus.description: Current stage in the transfer lifecycle

description.description: Human-readable descriptions of each fee category

minFeeApplied.description: Whether the minimum fee floor was applied

recipientDcc.description: DCC wallet address to receive CRS tokens

amount.description: Amount in USD value (e.g. 100 for $100 USDC)

splMint.description: SPL token mint address. Only USDC and USDT are accepted.

amountLamports.description: Amount in smallest token units (6 decimals)

mintAmount.description: CRS tokens to be minted (after fee)

recipientDcc.description: DCC wallet address to receive DUSD tokens

amount.description: Amount in USD value (e.g. 100 for $100 USDC)

splMint.description: SPL token mint address. Only USDC and USDT are accepted.

amountLamports.description: Amount in smallest token units (6 decimals)

mintAmount.description: DUSD tokens to be minted (after fee)

recipientSol.description: Solana wallet address to receive USDC/USDT

outputMint.description: Output SPL token mint. Choose USDC or USDT.

vaultAddress.description: Solana vault address holding DUSD reserves

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid admin API key

example.error: Too many requests — rate limit exceeded
